questionHtml:
Vitamins are organic compounds essential in small amounts.

State the name of one functional group common to all three vitamins shown in section 35 of the data booklet.
markschemeHtml:
hydroxyl ✔

NOTE: Accept “hydroxy” but not “hydroxide”.
Accept “alkenyl”.

Do not accept formula.

meta.title: Vitamins are organic compounds essential in small amounts. State the name of one functional group common to all three vitamins shown in section 35 of the data booklet.
